chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A. No.124 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. No.1409/2019. For hearing of main case. 07-08-2020 = Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Kashif Hussain Agha submits that he has been instructed by the latter learned counsel to not press this Revision Application which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith listed application. JUDGE Irfan Ali
